notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

home.description: If you weren't human, what would you be? 1001 lives — every one of them more surprising than you'd think.

q1.title: Your phone is almost dead. You:

options.a: Panic and beg a stranger for a charger
options.c: Power off and enjoy the freedom
options.d: Immediately blame yourself for not charging

q2.title: 3AM and you're still awake. What's happening?

options.a: Ordering food while watching a drama
options.b: Lying in bed staring at the ceiling
options.d: Writing a resignation letter in your head

q3.title: How do you handle a boring meeting?

options.a: Nod along while secretly online shopping
options.b: Take notes — what if there's a quiz later?
options.d: Wondering if you can escape through the window

q4.title: The elevator arrives but it's full. You:

options.b: Wait for the next one politely
options.c: Take the stairs as punishment for yourself
options.d: Go back to your desk — forget it

q5.title: You have a free Saturday, your instinct is:

options.a: Sleep until noon then feel guilty
options.b: Make a super productive plan and execute 10%
options.d: Lie in bed scrolling your phone and call it self-care

result.title: Your Reincarnation Identity
result.subtitle: The Bureau has calculated your next life:

archive.title: Archive of Souls
archive.subtitle: All the lives that have passed through
archive.empty: No records yet. Be the first to reincarnate!
